title: Paintable
description: Adds a paint bucket and paintbrush that you can use to paint your walls.
body:
![Paintable](https://imgur.com/cS0cKF1.png) [![discord](https://i.imgur.com/zpKwRpZ.png)](https://discord.gg/t9csvzqSYb) [![Twitter/X](https://i.imgur.com/pGJbNvS.png)](https://X.com/I_AmMaker) [![Patreon](https://i.imgur.com/sA2zMrl.png)](https://www.patreon.com/makers_mods)
- ## **New blocks:** - *Paint buckets* - *Painted Logs/Woods* - *Stripped Painted Logs/Woods* - *Painted Planks* - *Painted Planks Stairs/Slaps/Buttons/Pressure Plates/Fences/Fence Gates* - *Painted Doors/Trapdoors/Signs/Hanging Signs/Boats/Chest Boats* - *Painted Bricks* - *Painted Brick Stairs/Slaps/Walls* - *Painted Mud Bricks* - *Painted Mud Brick Stairs/Slaps/Walls* - ## **New Items:** - *Paint Brush*
